notes: Cubism Editor does not register PSD as a macOS document type, so the smoke used Cubism's internal model setup flow rather than plain open -a.
The editor window title changed to import_ready_candidate and the imported project displayed individual layer entries in the Parts panel.
This validates PSD import and non-flattened layer visibility only. It does not validate final visual quality, semantic mask correctness, ArtMesh/deformer/keyform authoring, or runtime export.
